The '''horned priest''' was one of the [[High Elder]]s of the [[Order of the Sacred Circle]] on [[Monastery/Legends|Monastery]]. He accompanied the [[green priest]] and [[Domina Tagge/Legends|Domina Tagge]] to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] to bring [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] to Monastery.

The horned priest was a [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] with large ears, a short snout, and an overall somewhat feline face. He had brown fur and a single horn growing from his forehead.
